Values.value: Monthly Active Rewards Service Triggered for challenge Id %challengePeriods/challengeId%

SEQUENCE.NAME: %challengeExecutionRs/periodDurationContinuance% == 'ONGOING' || %challengeExecutionRs/periodDurationContinuance% == 'ONGOINGCANCELLABLE'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: -- Create new ongoing periods till end of policy period --

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: -- Create new challenge period & issue award --

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check status of springboot api call ---
--- Check if API returned Data or not ---
--- check for completed in time or out of time ---

MAP.NAME: %completeEffectiveDate%>%challengePeriods/monitoringEndDate%
MAP.COMMENT: period status will be COMPLETEDOUTOFTIME if date is not within monitoringEndDate
-- Update Period Status in Challenge Periods --

Values.value: period status updated as %completedInTimeStatus% for period id %challengePeriods/challengePeriodId%

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Api call is failure throw exception ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
